snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Trailer): Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
15th May se Prajapati Pandey macha rahe hain bawaalвА¶ Kaun Patni, Kaun Woh? Hal karenge saare sawaalвА¶ Parivaar sahit dekhein! 

Presenting the Official Trailer of "Pati Patni Aur Woh Do" starring Ayushmann Khurrana, Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rakul Preet Singh, Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

вАЛA T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

Film Credits:

Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

snippet.title: EPIC - Teaser | Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya | Hesham AW | Naga Vamsi S | Aditya Hasan
snippet.description:
A beautifully crafted love story that captures the essence of everyday life and relationships вЭ§пЄП

Here's EPIC Teaser. In Cinemas Very Soon.

CAST & CREW
Starring: Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya
Writer & Director: Aditya Haasan
Produced by: Suryadevara Naga Vamsi & Sai Soujanya

Cinematographer : Azeem Mohammad
Editing: Navin Nooli
Production designer: Avinash kolla

snippet.description:
Kaalo Chasmo (Official Video) Gulshan Music,Jaat Nia,Ruchika Jangid | New Haryanvi Dj Song 2026

Kaalo Chasmo (Official Video ) a New Latest Most Popular Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2026.Kaalo Chasmo Haryanvi Song Starring with Gulshan Music & Jaat Nia .This superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Sandeep Surila & Ruchika Jangid. Music given by Gulshan Music. Penned by Farista. Copyright & Music label by Vats Records. 
  
#KaaloChasmo #GulshanMusic #JaatNia #RuchikaJangid #SandeepSurila #VatsRecords #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2026 #NewHaryanviSongs2026 #HaryanviDjSongs2026
  
рЯТЂClick to create Instagram Reels : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1324933496148874?igsh=MXN1dGM0bnY1c2J5MA==

Starring :- Gulshan Music & Jaat Nia & Navya
Singer :- Sandeep Surila & Ruchika Jangid
Lyrics :- Farista , Naveen Vishu Baba
Music/Composer :- Gulshan Music (8168614500)
Mix&Master :- Diwan Arya
Director :- Farista
Edit-Di :- Satish Prajapati
Dop :- Karan Barnala
Mekup ;- Sashi
Spl Thnx : Ravi Rangi,Vats Records Team
Digital Promotion : Gulshan Music {8168614500}

Label & Copyright - Vats Records
Company Owner : Pawan Sharma
Producer : Gulshan Sharma
For Any Enquiry Company Contacts
8168614500 , 7404210848

Kaalo Chasmo Song Lyrics : 

Ho Pilli Pilli Odhani Ko Lambo Lambo Ghunghat Look Yo Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me
Re Aagre Ko Gaghro Re Gach Thare Lagryo Choli Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Ho Tere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Ho Mere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
                                                (1)
Ho Gaddi Me Bi Dj Aale Gaana Tu Bajaiye Re
Re Gol Gol Gol Tu Kamar Matakaiye Re -2
Re Kamar Meri Ya Pkka Khajagi Maroda Je Me Nachi Mood Tufaani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me 
                                               (2)
Re Is Chail Gaabru Chore Gelya Hoya Thara Rista Ji
Thare Gaane Sunke Ji Mera Nachan Ne Kar Farista Ji-2
Laage Nach Nach Todegi Floor Meri Jaan Re Tu Aari Mood Tufani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

snippet.title: VARAVU - Trailer | Joju George | Arjun Ashokan | Shaji Kailas | Olga Productions
snippet.description:
Presenting the official Trailer of Varavu, featuring Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Murali Gopy, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath, and more. Produced by Naisy Reji under the banner of Olga Productions, directed by Shaji Kailas, with music composed by Sam CS.

Directed by : Shaji Kailas
Banner : Olga Productions
Produced by : Naisy Reji
Starring : Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Murali Gopy, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, 
Vani Vishwanath, Abhimanyu Shammi Thilakan
Written by: A K Sajan
Music & Background score : Sam CS
DOP : S Saravanan
Editor : Shameer Muhammed
Stunts : Stunt Silva, Kalai Kingson, Phoenix Prabu, Rajashekar Master, Thavasi Raj, Mafia Sasi, Jackie Johnson
Executive Producer : Jomy Joseph, Rahul Reji Thomas
Head of Production : Ron Issac Thomas
Production Controller : Vinod Mangalath
Chief Associate : Syamanthak Pradeep
Audiography : Rajakrishnan MR
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR
Costume : Sameera Saneesh
Makeup: Saji Kattakada
Lyricist : Vinayak Sasikumar, Harinarayanan, Santhosh varma
Still photography : Hari Thirumala
Choreography : Rekha Master 
VFX : Pictorial FX, Dotvfxstudios
Colourist : Liju Prabhakar
PRO : Manju Gopinath, Hains
Media Communication : Aparna Girish
Publicity Designs : Yellowtooths
Additional designs : Rocket Science
Outdoor Marketing : Bringforth
Visual Promotions : Snakeplant LLP

Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi

Mope Daanti Si Meense

snippet.title: King Trailer Leaked Shahrukh Khan vs Salman Khan Superhero | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
King Trailer Leaked + Salman Khan Superhero Movie Reaction by Deeksha Sharma. Shahrukh Khan with Deepika Padukone in Sidharth Anand King Movie leaked Pictures will challenge Jawan & Pathaan for Box Office Records while Salman Khan with Director Raj & Dk is ready for Shocking Announcement where as Raja Shivaji Riteish Deshmukh Movie created History in Marathi Cinema with Day 1 Collection Numbers but Real Question lies with Maddock who after Cocktail 2 will be back with Shakti Shalini Aneet Padda Horror Film after Saiyaara to Clash with both Avengers Doomsday & King Srk in December. What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#KingTrailer #ShahrukhKhan #SalmanKhanSuperhero

snippet.description:
рЭЩ∞ рЭЪЧрЭЪОрЭЪ† рЭЪОрЭЪЫрЭЪК рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪОрЭЪЯрЭЪТрЭЪХ.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX вАУ in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling вАФ and terrifying вАФ reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:

and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

snippet.title: GTA 5 Playing with @pajiislive  #gta5 #gtav #gaming
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, youвАЩre in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. DonвАЩt forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6 

  #gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.title: One Night Only | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
what would you do if you only had one night?

watch the trailer for one night only now. only in theaters august 7.
-----
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/onenightonlymovie 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@onenightonlymovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/onenightonlymovie
X: https://www.twitter.com/1nightonlymovie  
Official Site: https://onenightonlymovie.com

What if one messy night turns out to be the best thing that ever happened to you? 

This summer, Will Gluck, the filmmaker of Anyone but You and Easy A, celebrates modern romantic comedy on the big screen with a fresh, witty, swoony original film about searching for love on the least romantic night of the year. 

Academy Award¬Ѓ nominee Monica Barbaro (A Complete Unknown, Top Gun: Maverick) and BAFTA nominee Callum Turner (Masters of the Air, Fantastic Beasts franchise) star as Allie and Owen, two love-starved strangers who crash into each other in an ever-so-slightly fictionalized New York City on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and side quests complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from each other across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.

The filmвАЩs electrifying cast includes Maya Hawke (Stranger Things), Julia Fox (Uncut Gems), indie pop sensation King Princess (Nine Perfect Strangers), Ben Marshall (Saturday Night Live), Ziwe (Baited with Ziwe), and screen legends Molly Ringwald and Levar Burton.

One Night Only is co-written, directed and produced by Will Gluck, based on a script from Travis Braun. The film is produced by Will Gluck through his company Olive Bridge Entertainment, and by Olive Bridge VP Jacqueline Monetta (exec producer, Anyone but You).

Kaka X Jerry вЦЇ Haryana To Punjab (Official Video) Anshika Pandey | New Haryanvi Punjabi Song 2026

Presenting the official video of Haryana To Punjab вАФ a powerful musical collaboration bringing together the best of Haryanvi and Punjabi vibes! Featuring Kaka, Jerry, and Anshika Pandey, this track delivers high-energy beats, desi swag, and a powerful cultural vibe that brings Haryana and Punjab together like never before and a unique cross-cultural sound that stands out in 2026вАЩs music scene.

snippet.title: Franklin Almost Lost His Kids to CrocodilesвА¶ рЯШ± Last Minute Rescue! | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin is back in a high-stakes rescue mission! рЯШ±

After the shocking events, his children are captured and held inside a mysterious lab capsuleвА¶ and dangerous brainrot crocodiles are guarding them.

With the help of Trevor, Franklin tracks down the evil scientist behind everything and prepares for his biggest fight yet! рЯФ•

Will he save his kids in time? Or is it already too late?

вЪ° Watch till the end for a shocking twist!

This GTA 5 Malayalam story features intense action, emotional moments, and cinematic gameplay.

рЯСЗ Comment what should happen in PART 3!

#GTA5Malayalam #Franklin #GTAStory #Brainrot #MalayalamGaming #GTAVMods #ActionStory

snippet.title: Radha Radha Lyrical Video | Brindhavihari | GoldenMegaв≠РGanesh | Sid Sriram | VNP | Hesham AbdulWahab
snippet.description:
Presenting the"Radha Radha" in the voice of Sid Sriram is pure Love bliss. рЯОґвЬ® Surrendering to this melody.Song from the film BRINDAVIHARIрЯОґвЬ®
Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 

вАЬMusic SlateвАЭ
Cast : Golden Mega Star Ganesh , Devika Bhat, Malvika Sharma, Lakshmi, Ram Kumar, Rangayana raghu, Achyuth kumar, Sadhu Kokila, Avinash, Kuriprathap, Manju Pavagada, Jagappa, Giri. 
Music Composed, Produced and Arranged by : Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics : Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad
Singers : Sid Sriram & Chinmayi

--  Also Listen RAMA RAMA 
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
вЩ™ JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/2k8wrew5 
вЩ™ Amazon Prime Music: https://tinyurl.com/rm76utce 
вЩ™ Apple Music: https://tinyurl.com/5ybfepeu 
вЩ™ Spotify Music: https://tinyurl.com/ycytays7  
вЩ™ Insta: https://tinyurl.com/2kk8cbnb
вЩ™ Gaana Music: https://tinyurl.com/58em3twy
вЩ™ YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/2b2ea9js
-- 
Lyrics:
Pallavi:

Hadinaaru saavira Gopaala sthreeyara cheluvannu meeridaa Raadhike
Hadinaalku lokadaa manasoore maaduthaa
Nanagaagi jaaridaa taarike

Ninthale vaaluvaa gaarudi aagide
Idu yaava maayaa manthraano???
Kunthale theluvaa sambhrama moodide
Bisilalli maleya milanaano???

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaaneвА¶.
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

 ----

Charana 1:

Maddenu illade madaveri ninthiro
Maddhaane naanu aagode
Makaranda heeruthaa mai thumbikondiro
Dumbiya haage naanaade

Naaninna hesaranne gunugunugide
Kudidanthe raama rasaaвА¶ oo
Ninthalle bhoomina naa sutthide
Ee paada paadarasaa

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaaneвА¶.
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

Charana 2:

(F)
Manasoora daarige kanasoora mallige
Mruduvagi haasuvaa chaaliyo
Hareyoora therige thusugampu kedage
Manasaare Chelluvaa modiyo

(M)
Jeevave ontharaa
Premadaa nantharaa
Jagavella janthara mantharavo

Summane iddaru
Enano heluvaa
Prathimegala haage nannolavoвА¶

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaaneвА¶.
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane
AaaвА¶ aa..
--- 
 
 вАЬMusiciansвАЭ
Composed, Produced and Arranged by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics: Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad.
Singer: Sid Sriram & Chinmayi
Guitars & Bass: Sumesh Parameshwar.
Woodwinds,Strings Arranged and Produced by Josy Alappuzha.
Strings Conducted by: Josy Alappuzha.
Live Rythms and Percussions: Kalyan.
Halgi, Hand Duff, K-Dhol, Metal Shakers,
Pakhwaj, Puneri Dhol, Stk Duff, Tasha by Dipesh Varma.
Percussions performed by Dipesh Varma, Khwab Haria, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Vijay Jadhav
Additional programming: Josy Alappuzha, Vichuuuh and Praboa.
Mix and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy Kochi.
Mix Assisted by Santom Jose, Azhar Thaju.
Strings: Francis Xavier,Herald,Carol george,Dany, FrancisTS,Albin Jose, Mariadas, Subin Kumar.
Chorus:Sony Mohan,Aavani Malhar, Anila Rajiv, Ajmal Fathima, Neethusha AC,
Dr.Maalavika,Angel Mary Joseph,Anna Merin Easo, Zia and Dhana.Milan Joy, Akash V H, Amal C Ajith, Amithav Suresh, Akhil Dev, Famis Muhammad, Siyad k, Tansen Berny, Sangeeth Panchamam, Arjun B Nair, Deric Dereesh.
Recording Engineers:Shiju ediyatheril at Audio Gene Kochi, Aswin Kumar at K7 studio Kochi, Hesham Abdul Wahab, Vichuuuh & Praboa at HW studio Kochi, Vijay Dhayal and Sagar Sathe at YRF studio, Mumbai.
Assistant Recording Eng: Pete Dane Vaz at AudioGene Kochi, Gokul Krishna at K7 studio Kochi. Rahul Sahajrao at YRF Mumbai.
Artist Coordination: K.D Vincent, Kishore.
Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa.

snippet.description:
"Ab Tere Dil Mein Hum Aa Gaye" A 90s soulful music video featuring Akshay Kumar, Madhuri Dixit.

Song Credit:-

Title: Ab Tere Dil Mein Hum Aa Gaye
Movie/Album: Aarzoo (1999)
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Lyricists: Anand Bakshi

Music Director: Anu Malik
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Madhuri Dixit, Saif Ali Khan, Paresh Rawal, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics рЯСЗ

Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum

Dil hai dil dil dil hai ye mera
To to to to to
Tera ghar ye nahi hai
To to to to to
Jagah khaali nahi hai jhoothi aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum to
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge jhootha aaa

Agar tu kahe to tere naam likh doon
Agar tu kahe to tere naam likh doon
Main apne hazaaron janam
Wahan apni dhadkan bichha doon jahan tu
Meri jaan rakhe kadam

Teri dhadkane hain dhadakti hai dhadke
Teri dhadkane hain dhadakti hai dhadke
Dil is mein mera kya karen
Tera dil hai ghayal deewana hai paagal
Jo marta hai mujhpe mare
Tu na mili marjaaounga sanam
To to to to to
Jaan jayegi meri
To to to to to
Zindagi tu hai meri jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge ummmm

Yeh hathon ki mehendi
Yeh aankhon ka kaajal
Yeh hathon ki mehendi
Yeh aankhon ka kaajal
Deewana kare kyun humein
Yehi arzoo hai ke ab zindagi bhar
Tujhe dekhte hi rahen

Yeh bindiya yeh mehendi
Yeh kaajal yeh aanchal
Yeh bindiya yeh mehendi
Yeh kaajal yeh aanchal
Tere vaaste to nahi
Tu deewana paagal hai thoda anadi hai
Ja ja re ja tu kahin
Dil mein teri tasveer hai jhoothe nahi
To to to to to
Teri pooja karenge
To to to to to
Haan tujhe dekha karenge jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge ummmm

Tujhe chahate they tujhe chahaten hain
Tujhe chahate they tujhe chahaten hain
Tujhe chahate hi rahenge
Dil jo hai tera sanam ghar hai mera
Yahan aate jaate rahenge

Yeh bandhan ki dori bandhi hai tumhi se
Yeh bandhan ki dori bandhi hai tumhi se
Tumhi se hi bandhi rahegi
Tumhi se shuru hai yanhi khatm hogi
Dil ki kahani meri
Ek dujhe ke dil mein aagaye hum
Hum hum hum hum
Ek jab ho gaye hum
Hum hum hum hum
Kabhie hum na hon juda
Hmmm la la

Parbat udh jayenge saagar sookh jayenge
Tum humko bhool na paaoge
Hum tumko bhool na paayenge
Mat jaana mat jaana
Isi ka naam hai arzoo arzoo

Ek jab ho gaye hum
Hum hum hum hum

Hmmm la la

hi.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man - Salman Khan, Rani, Preity | Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
hi.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

snippet.title: O Jaane Jaan Main Haseen - Haqeeqat Movie Song | Ajay Devgan & Tabu | Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Dilip Sen Sameer Sen
Lyricist: Gulshan Bawra

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films, N. R. Pachisia
Director: Kuku Kohli
Cast: Ajay Devgan, Tabu, Amrish Puri, Johnny Lever, Aruna Irani 

Song Lyrics:

O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
Meri Ankhon Se Ojhal Ho Tu 
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Saajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
O Saajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
Meri Ankho Se Ojhal Ho Tu
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan

Sunke Tere Chude Ki Khanak 
Dil Kaise Sambhalu Tu Hi Abta
Mathe Pe Mere Tum Bindiya Banke 
Yu Hi Chamkate Rahna Sada
Ek Rath Ke Ham Do Pahiye Hai
Chalta Hi Rahe Karwa
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
O Janejaa Tu Haseen Main Jawaan

Chota Sa Hoga Sansar Apna
Milke Sahenge Sukh Dukh Sabhi
Rasme Nibhayenge Kasme Nibhayenge
Ye Pyar Kam Na Hoga Kabhi
Armano Ka Har Phul Khile 
Ye Bahare Rahe Meharbaa
O Janejaa Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan
Meri Ankho Se Ojhal Ho Tu
Kabhi Aye Na Aisa Sama
O Jaane Jaan Tu Haseen Main Jawaan
O Sajna Tu Hai Mera Jahan

Song: Tumsa Koi Pyaara
Movie: Khuddar (1994)
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: N. R. Pachisia
Director: Iqbal Durrani
Cast: Govinda, Karisma Kapoor, Kader Khan, Shakti Kapoor

Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi

Lakhon Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhen Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai

snippet.title: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho | Atif Aslam | Alka Yagnik | Kismat Konnection | Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Movie: Kismat Konnection
Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Sayeed Quadri

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Ramesh S. Taurani
Director: Aziz Mirza
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan, Juhi Chawla, Vishal Malhotra, Om Puri, Boman Irani

Song Lyrics:

O Oo O Hoo
Hoooo
Aaaaaa
Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zameen Se Falak Ke Darmiyan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubaar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

Kaise Batayein Tumhein Aur Kis Tarah Yeh 
Kitna Tumhein Hum Chahtein Hai 
Saya Bhi Tera Dikhe To Paas Jaake 
Usmein Simat Hum Jaate Hain
Rasta Tumhi Ho Rehnuma Tumhi Ho
Jiski Khwaaish Hai Humko
Woh Panah Tumhi Ho

Tum Hi Ho Besuba 
Tum Hi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Mujh Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho

Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Shab Mein Tumhare
Khwaab Haseen Jo Aate Hain
Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Labzz Woh Saare
Jism Ko Jo Mehkate Hain
Iftida Tumhi Ho
Imtihan Tumhi Ho
Tum Ho Jeene Ka Maksad
Aur Wajah Tumhi Ho

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Mein Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zamee Se Falak Ke Darmiyaan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

#AtifAslam #ShahidKapoor #VidyaBalan #BakhudaTumhiHo #KismatKonnection

snippet.title: а§Ьа§Ња§®а•З а§Ха•На§ѓа•Ла§В а§≤а•Ла§Ч а§Ѓа•Ла§єа§ђа•На§ђа§§ а§Ха§ња§ѓа§Њ | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
Dil se nikle geet, jo aaj bhi dhadkano mein base hainвА¶ Welcome to a journey of love and longing with the unforgettable voice of Lata Mangeshkar. In this video, we celebrate the magic of 'Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya' from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi, a song that beautifully captures the complexities and emotions of love in the 1970s. Lataji's soulful rendition brings to life the poignant lyrics and melodies, creating an atmosphere of pure emotion. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

Immerse yourself in the golden era of Bollywood music and let the timeless voice of Lata Mangeshkar touch your heart. Share your favorite Lata Mangeshkar song in the comments below! Like this video and subscribe to our channel for more classic melodies and unforgettable moments.

kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai

jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai

bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,

snippet.title: O Meri Laila | Laila Majnu | Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein | Tu Meri Laila
snippet.description:
Movie - Laila Majnu
Cast - Avinash Tiwary & Tripti Dimri

Song -  O Meri Laila
Singers - Jyotica Tangri
Music - Joi Barua
Lyrics - Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:

Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein
Aise Bhatakta Hoon Din Raat Dikhta Hoon Main Teri Raahon Mein
Mere Gunaho Mein Mere Sawabo Mein Shamil Tu
Bhooli Atthanni Si Bachpan Ke Kurte Mein Se Mil Tu

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Laila
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Maangi Thi Duwaen Jo Unka Hi Asar Hai Hum Sath Hain
Na Yahan Dikhawa Hai Na Yahan Dunyavi Jazbaat Hain

Yahan Pe Bhi Tu Hooron Se Zyada Haseen 
Yaani Dono Jahanon Mein Tumsa Nahi
Jeet Li Hain Aakhir Mein Hum Dono Ne Yeh Baaziyan 

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Zaiqa Jawani Mein, Khwaabon Mein Yaar Ki Mehmaani Mein
Marziyaan Tumhari Hon, Khush Rahoon Main Teri Manmaani Mein

Band Aakhein Karoon Din Ko Raatein Karoon
Teri Zulfon Ko Sehla Ke Baatein Karoon
Ishq Mein Un Baaton Se Hon Meethi Si Naraaziyan

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

snippet.title: а§Ха§єа•Л а§®а§Њ а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§єа•И (Happy) | Kaho Naa Pyar Hai | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Amisha Patel
snippet.description:
рЯОґ Dive into the golden era of 2000s Bollywood with the timeless magic of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan! This video celebrates the heart-touching melody of 'Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)', a song that continues to resonate with love and joy. Their voices, like a gentle breeze, perfectly capture the essence of first love and eternal romance.

Relive the sweet memories and let the enchanting vocals of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan fill your heart with warmth. 'Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)' is more than just a song; it's a journey back to a time when love was pure, and music was poetry.



Credits :

Song: Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)
Album: Kaho Naa Pyar Hai
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist: Ibrahim Ashk 



Lyrics :

I love you
Dil mera har bar
Yeh sunne ko bekarar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Ha tumse pyar hai
Ki tumse pyar hai


Inn pyari bato mein
Anjana iqrar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Pyar jahan mein hota nahi
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Pyar jahan mein hota nahi
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Duniya mein dil koyi
Kabhi na dhadka hota
Dhadka hai dil a yar mil
Yeh pyar ka ijhar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Do premi do pagal
Kya karte hain bolo
Do premi do pagal
Kya karte hain bolo
Mujhse kya puchhte ho
Apne dil ko dadolo
Malum hai hamko tumhe
Kis bat ka intejar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Milte nahi ham tum
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Milte nahi ham tum
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Sach bolu phir apna
Khwab na pura hota
Kehta hai mann apna
Milan duniya mein yadgar hai

Lyrics: 
Mizhi chaanthozhiche kuzhache
And she chirikondu nanache
Urache manasselurachoru 
Ghanayadi Anuraagam

Nejamaava? Cinemaava?
She is a sigmava ? Enigmava? 

If you know you know (IYKYK) chorus

Thedi nadannoru theneecha
Ini Sem aake neeya pareeksha
Aramani neram neeyum ente koode vanniri
Sundari Pimpiriye
So many aasha keri jet mele set 
Ini tell me prathividhi nin chiri chevikalil
Paattukalaaye.. 
Aa cute-ukalaaye.. 
My doodle-ye.. Njan Totallye.. Unusuallye.. 
Falling for you again again.

snippet.description:
Enjoy Bollywood romantic, evergreen & latest Hindi songs in stunning HDR & 4K quality with crystal clear sound вЭ§пЄП

Song Name: Yeh Galiyan Yeh Chaubara 
Singer Name: Lata Mangeshkar
Movie: Prem Rog (1982)
Music Director: Lakshmikant - Pyarelal
Lyrics: Santosh Anand

Lyrics - 

Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Yeh galiyan eh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Leja rang birangi yaaden
Hasne rone ki buniyaaden
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Mere haathon mein
Bhari bhari choodiyan
Mujhe bha gayi
Hari hari choodiyan
Dekh milti hain
Teri meri choodiyan
Tere jaisi saheli
Mere choodiyan
Tune peesee woh
Mehndi rang layi
Meri gori hatheli rach aayi
Teri aankh kyoon laado bhar aayi
Tere ghar pe bajeghi shahenayi
Sawan mein badal se kehna
Pardes mein hain meri behna
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Aa maaen milne gale
Chale hum sasural chale
Tere angan mein apna
Bas bachpan chod chale
Kal bhi suraj niklega
Kal bhi panchhi gayenge
Sab tujhko dikhayi denge
Par hum na nazar ayenge
Aanchal mein sanjo lena humko
Sapnon mein bula lena humko
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Dekh too naa humein bhulaana
Mana door humein hai jaana
Meri alhad si ankheliyaan
Sada palkon bhi basaanaa
Jab bajne lage baje gaaje
Jag lagne lage khali khali
Us dam tu itna samajhna
Meri doli uthi hai phoolon wali
Thode din ke yeh naate
The kabhi hanste the gate the
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi.
